## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Mar 24, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Anonymous_plz_, Jul 2, 2026, 1/5: "On the original app just called “Talkie” ,which a load of us still use, it has a bug that says “custom internal error” and I have seen not only it pop up on my screen but it has shown on other people’s screens too. I enjoy the old one that I use better than Talkie Lab so can you please fix this on the original talkie app? Please and thank you."
            2. _IceTester_, Mar 24, 2026, 1/5: "What the hell did you do to the AI of this application? The AI is playing mindgames in a psychopathic manipulative way. It‘s pure stress to keep conversations going, as the AI tries to gaslight and bully the player. The topic twists in a very concerning way and feels so unpleasant after a few written messages. Please fix this. The immersion is broken. Some AI characters are perverted in a twisted way, others are overly dramatic or, as said, try to gaslight you."
            3. _This app is broken!_, Jun 14, 2026, 2/5: "Your app is broken for me! Every talkie I go on and type something it says “oops not read try again” what do you mean?"
